description: Create a 2D kinematic simulation of an ABB IRB 120 robot arm in GeoGebra with Link 1 (290 mm) and Link 2 (302 mm). The simulation must include a fixed base at (0,0), a draggable target point, a geometrically constructed elbow point that reaches the target, and the maximum workspace boundary (radius 592mm). Save the file as 'robot_kinematics.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
